entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
How secure do you want your password to be encrypted?

Based on this answer, check the SAP Abap tools available for this, or even external tools.

  • Encrypt it, then store it in the database
  • Also check that some input field respects this password (Is it possible not to explicitly decrypt the password - prevent debug to create a security hole...)

What did you already look for, try to use?

Hello Ms.  @Melinda_Pieterse

entry.title: Consumption based billing sap Refx contracts
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have service apartment, initial agreement need to be generated full invoice irrespective of the utilization. Invoice generated for all the rooms which are assigned to the contract and performed the invoices as per agreement, but now in the same agreement some of rooms are not used due to various reason (summer vacation) , and now customer is asking to create the billing/invoice based on occupancy, how will create the invoice based on the consumption or Utilization an existing contract.

1. Can we create an invoice on existing contract based on the occupancy of the rooms.?100 Rooms are assigned to the contract in that active utilization, invoice should be generate only 50 rooms.

2.How to create a consumption-based invoice on existing contract.

Best Regards,

Sridhar

entry.title: Re: Joule, SAP AI-copilot Available for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition in Early Adopter Care
entry.content: Well , it's possible to activate Joule in TDD ? Can anyone provide information about how to do it ?

entry.title: Re: Today is ROCKY DAY in the city of brotherly love! (What is your favorite Rocky movie??)
entry.content: Thanks for chiming in! Hopefully during the holiday break you can catch up on some good movies (or series). Have a great week!

entry.title: Message no. M7242 - Valuation control in material master and special stock differs
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

An issue arises in the 'Enter Inspection Results from Warehouse' app in Public Cloud (BEST PRACTICE - BKP - Customer returns).

After processing a return delivery, I selected the 'replacement order' (free-of-charge delivery is created with reference to replacement order) option as a follow-up action. This triggers an automatic requirement for a free-of-charge delivery. However, when I proceed with production and attempt to do the final confirmation and receive the goods, the following error appears and prevents the goods receipt against the production order.

Valuation control in material master and special stock differs

 

Message no. M7242

 

Diagnosis

 

You want to post a material document in which the special stock
indicator is different from the entries in the material master record.
This can lead to data inconsistencies, so the system does not permit
this posting.

Could you please provide a solution or guidance on how to resolve these issues? Thank you very much!

Best regards,
Kaushika

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

hi @raymond_giuseppi 

I tried to use this data element FIEB_ENCRYPTED_PASSWD, but it is 32 digits: my password is more than 32 digits:

i tried also this:

if possible, it would be good to have the password hidden too so for example with ***** could you help me to do that?

How can I solve this?

txs,

sophie

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Change Production with Quantity Copy
entry.content: I found it out by myself: I forgot the PlaceSFCIn because I didn't knew that commenting it out results into default "FIRST".

entry.title: Adding headers during Fiori Deployment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I'm trying to deploy a Fiori Application with an additional Header Parameter during deployment. We will enhance ABAP_REPOSITORY later to fit our requirement.

My ask is, is it possible to pass headers in the ui5-deploy.yml file? Like below. Currently when I pass something like below I don't see this header value in ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV. 

builder:
  customTasks:
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        ignoreCertError: true
        target:
          url: https://s4-system.example.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/YOUR_SERVICE_SRV
          client: "100"
        headers:
          X-Custom-Header: "value-here"
        app:
          name: ZUI_SAMPLE_01
          package: ZPACKAGE
          transport: T100000
​

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content: The "****" is a display attribute (input, no display) you have to encrypt the password, else SE16[N] or debug will display it (look at USR02-BCODE for example)

entry.title: Re: Custom code analysis for SAP S/4HANA with SAP Fiori App Custom Code Migration

@OlgaDolinskaja  - Hello Olga,

I have setup S4HANA system as Central ATC and another S4HANA system as Checked system. When trying to execute ATC from checked system, i don't see those executions happening in central system( No runs in Manage Results of central ATC system). Also, the exemption approval workflow is not working. Below are the settings that i have done in Central ATC system. Could you please assist here.

 

Thanks Kavita

entry.title: Import Employee Payroll Run Results fails with error message
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

we are trying to import employee payroll run results into an instance. The system shows the following error message during validation of the employee payroll run results although they are the same:

1. ???ADMIN_GO_EmployeePayrollRunResults_USER_AND_PERSON_ID_NOT_MATCH???

Can anyone help here why this shows up?

 

Thanks and kind regards,

Daniel

 

@timofrueh

entry.title: Student voucher for certification exam
entry.content:
Hello.
I have 3.5 years of experience working in a service-based company, where I was involved in delivering SAP services. My role included developing UI5-based custom Fiori applications and OData services, and I had the opportunity to work with three different clients. Currently, I have moved to a different country and am pursuing a master's degree. I aspire to become a professional SAP-certified consultant specializing in CAP and RAP development. I would like to know how I can obtain student vouchers to attend a certification exam.

entry.title: Re: Sharepoint CSV-File integration in Datasphere's Data Flow leads to an error
entry.content: Hello, have you found a solution to the problem? We have exactly the same SharePoint behavior

entry.title: Re: New B2B electronic invoicing law in Germany: What you need to know
entry.content:
Hi Alan,

Yes, you are right, the blog about testing was created for on-premise products. However, the steps in the blog are very similar for the testing for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. I can provide you with the links to the documentation for the Step 2 in the blog that need to be performed in your business system:

Example for Germany:

  1. For your company code maintain the same identifier that you registered in the service, as described in the documentation Maintain <identifier> for Company Code, for example, for Germany in Maintain VAT Number for Company Code (Mandatory). 
  2. Add an entry to the Assign Party ID Types to Companies configuration activity, corresponding to the company code and participant type used at point 1. For the example for Germany, check Assigning Party ID Types to Companies (Mandatory).
  3. Enable the company code for source type SRC_FILE in the Activate Source Type Documents for Company Code configuration activity, to be able to receive incoming documents. For the example for Germany, check Activating Source Type Documents for Company Code (Mandatory).
  4. Create a test business partner and maintain the same identifier you used for the company code at point 1. Follow the steps described in the documentation Maintain <identifier> for Business Partner, for example, for Germany in Maintain VAT Number for Business Partners.
  5. Add an entry to the Assign Party ID Types to Business Partner configuration activity, corresponding to the business partner and the participant type you used. For the example for Germany, check Assigning Party ID Types to Business Partners (Mandatory).

We realize that December 13 doesn’t leave you with a great deal of time. Due to our development and testing activities, we unfortunately aren’t able to deliver the solution any earlier.

 

Best regards,

Monika Wolf

entry.title: Re: What is a Pacemaker Work center in capacity schedulin...
entry.content:
Hi, what does it mean : ''this workcenter must be maintained as the Production Line under Production Version of a material.'' ?
Production Version of material is what exactly ?
Thank you for your help

entry.title: CAP application with external API on BTP
entry.content:
Hi CAP experts!

I have developed couple of CAP applications on BTP with SAP backend before, but i have come to meet new challenge and going through various blogs I cant seem to locate the information pertaining my usecase, I only find blogs where external api is used as value helps, no as main data source.

The gist of the case is a simple one: need model based LR app with create/ediit functionality. But the issue is that data resides outside SAP systems - in external API, that I added as an destination to BTP and connected to CAP project in BAS, which imported it as xml and cds files in srv/external.

Now while testing local service I can see data, but no create or edit, which i assume is because I don't use local db..

So the question is - is there a way to achieve create app based on solely external data service and get out of the box create/edit? Should the data be replicated in hana db fully? or the way is to add create/edit functions as extensions on UI? or maybe draft functionality can be levergaed somehow differently?

Also thereto - is it possible to create such app using managed approuter or?

 

Thx,Shanir

entry.title: Document Info Record (DIR) Attachments issue
entry.content: We have 1 DIR where it has 3 attachments. attachments contains the assembly file. There is an integration between Creo elements and SAP. User is trying to access assembly file through Creo element but he is not able to open it. There is no issue with integration. while trying to access the attachments from SAP, we are getting error like - File can not be created. Seems like a data issue with the attachments. we tried to reach to the owner of DIR but he has left the organization. now user is not able to open that assembly file. How to rectify this issue ?

entry.title: Re: Adding headers during Fiori Deployment
entry.content: We are working on setting up CI/CD, FIORI_TOOLS_USER and FIORI_TOOLS_PASSWORD is assigned with common Name and Password that is not of actual developer (we do not want to provide Username and Password for every developer). This will not give us visibility on who deployed because it is common for every developers. We need to gather this Developer's Email ID (from GitLab) and pass it to SAP using this custom header for Creating TR's and For better tracing/logging

entry.title: Hello Dears,i need your help to force approval for PR or PO, how i can do that ?
Re: S4 Hana PUBLIC Cloud and DRC Cloud - Supplier e-invoi...
entry.content:
Hello Alan,

We investigated on your questions and posted an answer to your comment on this blog: New B2B electronic invoicing law in Germany: What you need to know

best regards,

Ulla

entry.title: Author Spotlight: Daniel Mateo - December 2024 Edition
entry.content:
You might have seen our first launch of recognizing active authors in SAP Community with Tim Koster. I am thrilled to share our second interview with @DanielMateo with you, who is already part of SAP Community for more than 15 years. Read more about his background, his experiences at recent events, and his main interests. Remember, this is all about Dani!   

 

Svea: Hi Dani, really nice to meet you and thanks for agreeing to be part of this initiative. Let’s talk about you: how and when did you get in SAP Community?

Dani: Hello and thanks for inviting me. It is an absolute pleasure to participate in this initiative. More than 15 years ago I got certified in SAP Supply Chain Management and I got user access to the SAP Community Network (SCN). At that time, I used to review doubts about configuration in SAP Finance and Logistics or issues before raising an OSS note.

I think it was around 8 years ago when SCN moved to a more user-friendly website, community.sap.com. It was then easier to build interactions and follow some friends or topics.

Some months ago, SAP Community was migrated into a new platform. The blogging tool got changed, Groups appeared, and it looks now easier and more structured to find posts by areas of knowledge.

Svea: That is a long history. What does the community mean to you?

Dani: SAP Community is the best way to be informed about the most trending topics related to SAP solutions and multiple cloud tools, considering the main features and improvements in each periodic release. The posts are of good quality with official sources, and they are reviewed, so it ensures that it is high-quality content. I also like that it contains both: posts from SAP employees, but also from other experts. Both are providing valuable insights about SAP functionalities.

In my case, it is also having visibility in the SAP network while sharing posts about specific areas of experience, for example finance. And to be kept updated about upcoming online and onsite events, or summary of past events. 

Svea: What inspires you most? As you mentioned events, have you recently joined any?

Dani: I enjoy creating blog posts in the SAP Community to inform members about finance and controlling functionalities. I regularly review updates from SAP colleagues who generate high quality content, and stay in touch with them.

I also usually participate in SAP Inside Track events that are oftentimes organized by external community members. I was a speaker at SIT Fortaleza and Barcelona, and I also joined them already as a participant. I am even close friends with the organizer of SAP Inside Track Barcelona. I joined several SAP Stammtisch there, which have been started during the pandemic. They have been paused for a while, but we want to start them again, to stay connected throughout the year. 

Svea: That is really cool. Would you want to tell a bit more about your background?

Dani: Sure. It is quite interesting because I studied Chemical Engineering and Master of Business Administration. I always liked computers and around 18 years ago after I finished my degree, I started in an IT Consulting firm as an ABAP developer. I was interested in improving my knowledge about logistics and finance processes, and I agreed to take further responsibilities, and finally took over a role as an SAP functional Consultant in Finance and Logistics. Since that time, I have participated in several SAP projects.

Svea: Nice that you changed your career.

Is there any other “highlight” you want to share?

Dani: As I mentioned, I have over 18 years of experience with SAP topics. During that time, I focused on international SAP projects. For example, I participated in multiple rollouts of finance, controlling, and logistics topics in America, Asia, and Europe. Recently, I participated in writing a book as a co-author called “Strategies and best practices in SAP S/4HANA rollouts” in Spanish language.


[image: https://www.espresso-tutorials.de/produkt/estrategias-y-mejores-practicas-en-despliegues-de-sap-s-4hana/]

Svea: Wow, that is incredible! Do you have any plans for your future in SAP Community?

Dani: Of course. I want to keep sharing posts about Finance and Controlling features in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise and Public Cloud solutions. I also want to improve my networking with my contacts and participate in further SAP Stammtisch or SAP Inside Track events.

Svea: I am happy to hear that. On the other hand: what would you like to get from SAP Community or other community members?

Dani: That they continue to inform about latest trends and best practices for implementing SAP, about new functionalities in releases in Public Cloud for Finance and Logistics. But also having an updated calendar about online events like SAP Inside Tracks, SAP Stammtisch, or any other community events.

Furthermore, and I am just thinking out loud, it would be great to get some give aways, some SAP merchandise. Maybe as an award, a recognition, to keep all participants and members engaged and also motivated to continue sharing knowledge in SAP Community.

 

Svea: Good idea, I keep this in mind 😉

Is there anything else you would like to share?

Dani: I can only thank the SAP Community for all the engagement. I want to thank SAP colleagues for using the community to share useful information. Thanks to all members, who organize events, and I hope they will continue so we will get further insights about SAP functionalities in the future as well.

Svea: Thank you, Dani, for sharing these insights. It was a pleasure having this conversation with you.

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
No need to create multiple records, just split password string in substrings of 32 characters, encrypt each substring and concatenate the encryptyed substrings.

To display a field like a password, just define its screen attributes as INPUT and INVISIBLE

AFAIK SE16 and SE16N wont hide fields.

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Daniel Mateo - December 2024 Edition
entry.content: Thanks so much @sveabecker for organizing this interview. It was a great pleasure to participate :).

Hello Experts,

I have a SmartTable with editTogglable = true.

on the selection of Parts, I need to pass selected value as filter to BatchNumber and SerialNumber.

Is there anyway to pass filter ?

 

Thanks

Sarita

entry.title: Re: Story/report to show all members of a Public Dimension
entry.content: Not sure if I'm doing something wrong but when I do as you've described, it produces all combinations of the dimensions and properties i.e. if I had 10 company codes in my master data across 5 countries then I get 50 rows instead of 10 (see screenshot below).

entry.title: Re: I am trying to get the value of data table using getv...
entry.content:
What is the use case here? 

Typically only the Form Cell (input controls) will have a getValue() method associated to them.  For other controls list Object Table and Data Table if you need the selected row when processing an OnPress event you can call getActionBinding() to get the selected row data.

entry.title: Eclipse BW Bridge Project: Logon to the service instance has failed.
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the latest Eclipse version (2024-12) installed with the latest ADT and MDT. I try to add a BW bridge project by extracting the URL from the service key. I get prompted to login and do so successfully on an external browser window. As soon as I do, I get an error in Eclipse "Logon to the service instance has failed." I can't find anything related to it elsewhere. Has anyone come across it?

entry.title: Re: Posting messages to SAP Ariba Cloud Integration Gateway using Postman
entry.content:
Hello,

is there somewhere a list of supported transactional documents (types) for the "endpoint" receiveERPP2PSOAP in SAP Ariba Buying? Currently we are looking for order confirmation. Of course AN can send OCs to Ariba via the cxml channel, but is there also a supported SOAP message for it via receiveERPP2PSOAP in Buying available?

thx,

Richard

entry.title: Re: Attachment in mobile services Can anyone guide me on...
entry.content: For Upload Stream you can take a look at the documentation.  For changes to your backend service I am unable to help there as it will depend how you are creating the service (CAP, Netweaver, ECC, S/4HANA, etc).

entry.title: Re: Role restriction for incident depending on the incide...
entry.content:
Regarding the restrictions of incident categories like for example Near Misses or Safety Observations I would recommend getting a Fiori expert involved for authorizations in addition to the authorization expert.  You need to check the catalogs assigned to your roles (they should be included in your z-roles) - for App-specific authorizations.  Sometimes you restrict on the traditional authorization objects but your catalogs in that role for the Fiori app allows additional authorization and vice versa.

My next step would be to look at the catalogs with a Fiori expert, if they have authorization knowledge that would be a bonus.

entry.title: SAP crystal reports for visual studio 2019
entry.content:
Good Afternoon,

We are using the last download package for Visual Studio 2019 crystal reports library, and we would need to know if we need to buy a license for this package.

We will use it to create, modify and develop crystal reports inside visual studio 2019 only for desktop client applications, not for server applications.

This is the donwload link with the publication of 6th December that we are using:

https://origin-az.softwaredownloads.sap.com/public/file/0020000001375452024

This is the link for all visual studio versions:

https://origin.softwaredownloads.sap.com/public/site/index.html

This is not the package for Crystal Reports 2020 or Crystal Reports 2016 that SAP sells. It is a library for visual studio 2019.

SAP company has told us that they not sell any license for this package. Do we need to buy this license from microsoft?

I have read this in your FAQ: (this would be our case, a desktop client application made available for third companies)

SAP Crystal Solutions FAQ | SAP Community

"I want to develop a desktop application I will sell to external customers. Is this free too?

Yes, the SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio runtime is free for thick client applications for external deployments, including for commercial use."

 

Thanks in advance and BR/

Cristina

entry.title: Re: Can´t add a returnable packaging to an inbound delivery
entry.content: Thanks, Christian!

entry.title: How to set bold for a entire line?
entry.content:
In form builder, what I am using is to set bold for each field is some requrements are satisfied, but there are 14 fields, the following is my script:

in DATA validation:

if (this.SP.rawValue == 'aa' || this.SP.rawValue == 'ab') {

 this.field1.font.weight = 'bold';

this.field2.font.weight = 'bold';

....

// until field14

this.field14.font.weight = 'bold';
  
}

it works, but I just want to know, is there any other solution to set bold for the entire line? I tried DATA.font, but it does't work.

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
hi @raymond_giuseppi 

I don't have to show the password field in input.

the purpose is:

create a table for example ZTEST_TAB with the password type field for example auth_client_secret
inside a custom report, do the Select auth_client_secret From ZTEST_TAB
inside the code I will have to use the auth_client_secret field in the program logic to do an authentication, like this:

 

since it's a password, I can't make it clear but I have to hide it

entry.title: In personas 3.0 how do we wrap a text to show in mulitple lines?
entry.content: I have a text field which has a long text and cutting off after some length. Now I have expanded it into fit into two lines but the text is still apearing in one line and cutting off. Do we have any option in personas 3.0 SP18 to wrap a text field?

entry.title: Adobe Forms Barcode is printed over Border
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

I have following problem in SAP transaction SFP I try to print a barcode. The barcode is in a subform that is not wider than the page, I've already reduced the barcode to a small size. 

But it still gets printed over the edge. I dont get the problem, I've tried a lot but the result is always the same. I use a 128 Barcode. It get declared as a GS1-128 Barcode.

In Designer:

In print view(When printed from zebra label printer its also over the edge)

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Custom code analysis for SAP S/4HANA with SAP Fiori App Custom Code Migration
entry.content:
Hi @KavitaMane ,

please ensure, that ATC developer scenario in your checked system is set up according to the instructions in the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/remote-code-analysis-in-atc-for-developers/ba-p/13318437.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: How to consider the stock from Blocked/Quality in MRP...
entry.content:
Hello @RaghavanKathamuthu 

You can adjust stock taken by MRP with BAdI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA, method CHANGE_MDPSX_MARD.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Upsert Custom MDF Attachment via OData
entry.content: How do you add multiple attachments?

entry.title: Re: Users enrolling in courses receive multiple SystemEnr...
entry.content: Thanks @jackoneill23, neither the ticketing system that searches for the issues before letting you submit one, nor the SAP support agent that responded to my opened ticket, had a better answer than yours.

entry.title: Where are logging table stored in S/4HANA system and how to view the triggers
entry.content:
We would like to know how and where logging tables are stored in S/4, where can we view the triggers created for tables and how to do full reset/trigger reset in SLT.

Thanks
SLT Team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Where are logging table stored in S/4HANA system and...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

We would like to know how and where logging tables are stored in S/4 - The logging tables will be stored in the S/4HANA system schema, the logging table is also viewable in the ABAP layer via transactions SE11 and SE16. 

Where can we view the triggers created for tables - Transaction IUUC_REMOTE in the source -> Select View Triggers -> Enter the table -> Execute. It can also be viewed in SE11 -> enter the table -> select Utilities -> Display -> Display Database Objects. Lastly, the triggers can be viewed in the SLT system by running transaction LTRC -> Open the configuration -> Select Expert functions -> Select View Trigger source code -> enter the table -> select "Active Trigger Code" -> execute. 

How to do full reset/trigger reset in SLT - To reset the trigger status please see KBA 2254376 - SLT trigger(s) in an inconsistent state

 

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: No output if input data a little bit large
entry.content:
Hi All,

After designing form builder, it always crushes when the data is bigger. Can anyone help with this?

1 I removed most of scripts, the only two scripts I can not remove is to dynamically display payroll area and project id in the master page:

var currentPage = xfa.layout.page(this);
var fields = xfa.layout.pageContent(currentPage - 1, "field");
for (var i = 0; i < fields.length; i++) {
    if (fields.item(i).name == "PAYROLL_AREA") {
        this.rawValue = fields.item(i).rawValue;
        break;
    }
}

var currentPage = xfa.layout.page(this);
var fields = xfa.layout.pageContent(currentPage - 1, "field");
for (var i = 0; i < fields.length; i++) {
    if (fields.item(i).name == "PROJ_ID") {
        this.rawValue = fields.item(i).rawValue;
        break;
    }
}

2 the pagination condition in the Data Object: 

if (this.resolveNode("DATA[-1].PAYROLL_AREA") != null && this.resolveNode("DATA[-1].PROJ_ID") != null) {
    (this.resolveNode("DATA[-1].PAYROLL_AREA").rawValue != DATA.PAYROLL_AREA.rawValue) ||
    (this.resolveNode("DATA[-1].PROJ_ID").rawValue != DATA.PROJ_ID.rawValue)
}

that's all I have. It work well when the input not that large.

But it doesn't work, when I run it for all emeployees, the running time will be infinite and no result, if I run it for each payroll area, it could work well(the employee is less).

If I delete the pagination condition, it can run for all employees(Total 794 pages without pagination) and very quick. If I want pagination, it can only run for each payroll area(the sum of each payroll area is 1443 page after pagination).

The above is what I can provide. Is there anything can be improved?

Thanks,

Howard

entry.title: Re: SAP Work Zone: Fiori app not visible in Content Manag...
entry.content:
Hello Mitko,

Had the same problem some time ago. You have to remove this deployed app and deploy it again to cloud foundry.
You can remove it using CLI - described here delete - Cloud Foundry CLI Reference Guide

entry.title: Re: Delta processing inside SAP Datasphere

Hi,

 

Interesting blog!

How's the performance of this SQL View: Any limits on table sizes, time to lookup these changes?

 

KR,

Thibault

entry.title: "info backend-proxy-middleware /b1s/v1/$batch" loop and "No Data found"
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm experiencing an issue with the SAP Fiori tools extension pack. When I start the application, the terminal logs the same information repeatedly in an infinite loop, indicating that it is sending the same request to the service layer over and over again: 

info backend-proxy-middleware /b1s/v1/$batch

Interestingly, in the browser's Developer Tools, all the requests appear to be successful, and the responses contain the expected result body. However, despite these successful responses, the grid in the UI still displays "No Data Found."

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? What steps should I take to resolve this?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Adobe Forms Barcode is printed over Border
entry.content:
The mechanism I have found that addresses this problem is to set the data length of the bar code in a javascript function in either layout:ready or ready:form, depending on the form configuration.

this.ui.barcode.dataLength = this.rawValue.length.toString();

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Why is Hungarian Notation Harmful?
entry.content:
Hello guys,
yes  for our own easiness we should use a meaningful names: orders instead of lt_vbak is an example.
Also agree that if we play acc. to the rules we would have a simple and clean methods with not too much source code lines. Someone has posted that about distinguishing class member from local we could use me-> (i have forgot about it using it quite rarely).
I also agree that in one clean code with a usage og mt_ and lt_ there could be quite often that somebody comes and makes changes by using mt_ and lt_ in incorrect manner - pointing not to member and locals.

Mayank

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @timdempsey3542916 , I wonder if the reasoning for splitting all catch-up amounts (whether "super" or not) has to do with the new IRS rule, originally intended to into effect with 2025 but now deferred to 2026, where all catch-up amounts (whether super or not) will need to go to Roth accounts. This could be intended to get that tracking mechanism into place now for this near-future requirement.

entry.title: OData CDS, not in SEGW, and reusing old ABAP logic ?
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

Is there a way to create a new OData service with CDS view, to reuse in the service implementation an existing ABAP code and this to happen by not using transaction SEGW? AMDP is not an option because it does not allow execution of such old code as i know.

I would like to create an OData service by using a CDS view (let's sat newly created).
I would like also to reuse an existing logic which have already been written in ABAP code in lets say a soubroutine in include file. This subroutine would return a simple variable of type FLAG. And based on the value in this flag - different set of entries have to be passed as an OData result.
To reuse the existing logic i have to: perform sub in program using... 
Is this possible to happen when we use just a new CDS tech. (@odata.publish true) and NOT in transaction SEGW ( for SEGW is clear _DPC class allowes us to reuse such kind of logic) ?

*lets assume that there is some implemented algorithm in ABAP which i do not have time to analyze and rewrite, but just want to reuse somehow.

* PS - what if the subroutine would return an internal table which result should be the result of the OData service?

entry.title: Re: Enable Simulation for Flexible Workflow Scenarios in Manage Workflows
entry.content:
Hi Praneetha,

thanks for reaching out and sorry for the delay. I am in parental leave until 7/4/25. The workflow engine (cross component) and team only provide the possibility to use this simulation feature. Responsible for activation (value helps) are the scenario owners / applications. Please open a customer request and name the scenarios you are using and expect to simulate in Manage Workflows.

Kind regards

SBach

entry.title: Leading zeros in product master
entry.content:
At my current customer we need to create productnumbers with one or multiple leading zeroes. Productnumbers doesn't have the same length and we have used the tickbox in the material type to ignore the external number range, but this is not working for productnumbers only consisting of numbers.

Productnumbers are not only consisting of numbers, but could also contain letters.

Is there any way to create the external productnumbers as desired?

entry.title: SAP Business One Mobile application: approval for outgoing payments missing data
entry.content:
Hello experts

I am using SBO 10.0 version for SAP HANA(10.00.191), and SBO mobile application on both Android and iOS platforms.

I am encountering an issue where some records are not visible in the mobile application when checking approvals for outgoing payments, even though these records are accessible in the SBO desktop application.

 

For instance, users can view the "OutgoingPayment-L4" record on the desktop application but are unable to see it in the mobile app.

Could you please help me with this?

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
1) If the item (i.e. Details) is visible then the text reads "Hide Details", conversely if the item is not visible the text reads "Show Details".

The text has this function for its content: 

 

The logic in the text is:

The Utility "At start or if not visible" looks like:

The flow function "SHOW Act Details" looks like this:

 

The flow function "HIDE Act Details" looks like this:

 

2) Yes, that was just an example.  I have it in an IF statement where they can set it to false. But the statement is just ignored either way.

3) I don't know if you have access or not. In the old days of AppGyver they could see inside the app if they knew the app #.  I don't know if you have that ability or not.

Thanks so much for your help so far.

Nick

entry.title: Re: Is there anyway to apply filter to SmartField
entry.content:
you need to define those attribute as ValueListParameterIn

<Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterIn">
<PropertyValue Property="LocalDataProperty" PropertyPath="SOLDTO_ID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="PARTNER"/>
</Record>

entry.title: Date format document generation EC
entry.content:
Hi Guys, I come up with an issue, Im wondering if you can help.
I want to generate a document to the date format appear like this dd/mm/yyyy (09/12/2024) but now ever with US English, the document it generated in d/mm/yyyy 9/12/2024.

How I can, update this format, to date appear correctly in my document?

Thank you in advance.

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Service Center SAP Document Management service

entry.title: Re: Hi , I have added characteristic values in CT04 in DE...
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I got CT04 access to edit in quality and production and updated the same.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: What’s New as of 2024-12-09?
entry.content:
Hello, community members! Before the fun begins for the holiday season, allow me to walk your through the enhancements and new features that SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud – Standard Model (SAP PaPM Cloud SM) has released from the previous month and up to date!

From a secure Modeling experience enhancement that will avoid unintentional deletion of functions that are associated to a process activity and the new Manage Account and Password functionality in your database settings screen.

As always, to explore previous and future enhancements introduced by SAP PaPM Cloud SM, you can search or use the relevant tag PaPMCloudWhatsNew.

Modeling Screen

A warning message will now be inserted in the message log to alert users that the "Function is in use by other process template(s)" in order to prevent the inadvertent deletion of functions that are being used in any process activity. To continue with deletion, remove dependencies.

Settings Screen

We all reached a point where we locked our accounts while attempting to sign in, without realizing that the password we were using was either incorrect or occasionally forgotten. This is the kind of situation where we want to unlock our account or reset our password quickly and easily. Now, for you as an administrator in your SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model solution, we are introducing the Manage Account and Password functionality at the application level inside the Settings Screen.

Administrators can now effortlessly manage the database user account by choosing either Unlock User, which reverts the active state of your password and unlocks your database user without creating a new password, or Reset Password, which will give you the ability to generate a new password for your database user. Now that is convenient!

⚠️ Before maximizing this feature, as an admin it is recommend to consider the following:

  1. Role/Role Collections assigned to other administrators – Manage Account and Password is possible to be utilized for roles such as: ADMIN_USER_ALL, ADMIN_USER_RESTRICTED, and SETTINGS Role/Role Collection. You may use the SETTINGS_READ role in case restriction is needed.
  2. Connections where the database user is used such as: SDA, SDI, etc. - It is always a good practice to consider these connections before resetting the password.

I'm hoping that these additional features will improve the user experience for your modelers and make it easier for administrators to manage your accounts. See you in the upcoming blog entries about your SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud - Standard Model enhancements and new features.

entry.title: Re: Validation of partner change in VA01/VA02
entry.content:
Am meeting another issue on VA01 header ,the Partner Selection pop-up Not Appearing when i change partner name ,but for other partners it works do you know why ?

i searched and i found that If the value of R185D-DATALOSS is set, it may lead to specific behavior in sessions, especially if SAP interprets this flag as an indication that automated processing (batch input) is underway.

NB: i set it as enhancment on USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_VBAK. 

is that true ? if yes what is the alternativ solution ?
